title: Define Radio Group Properties
text: Define Radio Group Properties Define the properties for this radio group when it appears in Microsoft Windows. A radio group is a field that is displayed as a group of two or more mutually exclusive options. It is suitable for a limited number of choices. For more information, see uradiogroup (RadioGroup) . How to Setting Widget Properties in the Properties Inspector Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
